commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Their. Hebrew, "my servants "(Menochius) half of whom only wrought, while the rest stood guard. If we adhere to the Vulgate, we must suppose that Nehemias altered his first plan, and ordered almost all to be ready to fight or to labour, as occasion might require, ver. (Calmet) In. "Over, (Haydock) or behind all the family of Juda "(Vatable) encouraging the people by word, and sometimes by example. (Tirinus) (Menochius).
